fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. `cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features profile-browser` succeeds for ticket-viewer-dioxus. 2. Native `cargo check` remains clean. 3. No behavior change to the DepGraph webgpu path or TicketListStore hashchange listener.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Fix wasm32 build regression from mechanical unused cleanup (dep_graph/page.rs, store.rs)

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. `cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features profile-browser` succeeds for ticket-viewer-dioxus. 2. Native `cargo check` remains clean. 3. No behavior change to the DepGraph webgpu path or TicketListStore hashchange listener.
fields.implementation_summary: Restored wasm-only imports in components/dep_graph/page.rs gated behind #[cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")] (dioxus_router::Navigator, crate::types::TicketRef, super::interactions::select_node_or_navigate); changed the webgpu branch to pass the _-prefixed bindings; restored `let mut open_ticket` in store.rs with #[cfg_attr(not(target_arch = "wasm32"), allow(unused_mut))]. No behavior change.
